{{Infobox construct
| name = The Fleshripper
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Fleshripper]] is an [[Underlord]] Countermeasure.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[The Fleshripper]] is a [[sword]]-[[construct]] that resembles a hunched armored skeleton.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17" />}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Dross]] wants to see [[The Fleshripper]] in action.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c18">''Dreadgod'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
